description: 数学建模竞赛论文结构标准 - 适用于 HiMCM 等数学建模竞赛

required_sections.name: Summary
required_sections.description: 概括问题、模型方法、主要结果与建议

required_sections.name: Problem Restatement & Analysis
required_sections.description: 重述问题、定义变量与约束、列出假设

required_sections.name: Assumptions & Justification
required_sections.description: 列出模型假设并逐一论证其合理性

required_sections.name: Model Development
required_sections.description: 从简单到复杂构建数学模型，含公式推导

required_sections.name: Model Solution & Analysis
required_sections.description: 求解模型，分析结果，进行参数敏感性分析

required_sections.name: Model Evaluation
required_sections.description: 评估模型优缺点，验证模型有效性

required_sections.name: Conclusion & Recommendations
required_sections.description: 总结解决方案，提出建议

required_sections.name: References
required_sections.description: 列出所有数据来源与参考文献
